item.title: Blueprint personalizer
item.intent: Blueprint wizard must ask 1-3 personalization questions per blueprint so forged agents reflect user-specific preferences, not generic defaults.
item.description: USER VALUE: Phase 2 personalization. Adds customization_questions to blueprint schema so wizard asks 1-3 tailored questions. Valuable but not blocking: Email Manager (CQ-017) must work end-to-end first. Build after CQ-010 + CQ-017 prove the forge pipeline.
steps: Add customization_questions field to blueprint YAML schema
Implement wizard prompts for 1-3 questions per blueprint
Apply user answers to config generation output
acceptanceCriteria: Wizard asks 1-3 tailored questions per blueprint
Answers reflected in generated config output
